texto: Positivity, that's one of the things I try to spread throughout my company and really anyone I come in contact with. Because as you know, life's too short. You got to keep it positive and keep it fun.
explicacao: Citação de Jose Garces sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Positivity, that's one of the things I try to spread throughout my company and really anyone I co…” articula vida, short, fun em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como short e fun.
